summary: Completed backend and frontend testing for new AI trading bot dashboard feature. All 25 backend API tests passed. NewDashboard component renders correctly with bot status, P&L, performance chart, bot's brain thoughts, active positions, and watching setups.

issues: Bot status shows 'LOADING' briefly during initial load before updating to 'HUNTING' - acceptable behavior

backend_apis.GET_dashboard_data: PASS - Returns bot_status, today_pnl, open_pnl, open_trades, watching_setups, recent_thoughts, performance_summary
backend_apis.GET_equity_curve_today: PASS - Returns equity_curve array, trade_markers, summary with stats
backend_apis.GET_thoughts: PASS - Returns thoughts in first person with confidence, action_type, timestamp

frontend_components.NewDashboard_header: PASS - Shows bot status (HUNTING/LOADING), session (MARKET CLOSED), regime (HOLD), BRIEF ME button, P&L display
frontend_components.BotPerformanceChart: PASS - Chart renders with time range toggles (Today/Week/Month/YTD/All) all clickable
frontend_components.BotBrainPanel: PASS - Displays bot thoughts in first person, shows Processing indicator, View History link
frontend_components.ActivePositionsCard: PASS - Shows 12 OPEN positions with LABD visible including shares, entry, current, stop, target, P&L
frontend_components.WatchingSetupsCard: PASS - Shows 0 PENDING setups with empty state
frontend_components.ScannerAlertsStrip: PASS - Shows 0 NEW alerts with empty state
frontend_components.time_range_toggles: PASS - All 5 buttons (Today/Week/Month/YTD/All) clickable and functional

critical_code_review_comments: NewDashboard component correctly fetches data from /api/trading-bot/dashboard-data endpoint
BotPerformanceChart fetches equity curve data with proper period parameter
All components handle empty states gracefully
Auto-refresh intervals implemented: 15s for dashboard, 30s for chart, 30s for thoughts
Real-time P&L updates showing correctly (observed -$2,884.35 open P&L updating)
test_credentials: N/A - no authentication required for these endpoints
seed_data_creation: None - tests use live bot data
context_for_next_testing_agent: Iteration 71 tested the new bot-centric dashboard feature. All 3 new API endpoints (/api/trading-bot/dashboard-data, /api/trading-bot/performance/equity-curve, /api/trading-bot/thoughts) work correctly. NewDashboard.jsx, BotPerformanceChart.jsx, and BotBrainPanel.jsx render properly with real-time data updates. The bot was in HUNTING mode with 12 open positions during testing. Test file at /app/backend/tests/test_new_dashboard_apis.py covers all new endpoints.
